content: I don't know why I'm late

It sounds like you're feeling a bit unsettled about being late. That’s completely understandable; it can be frustrating not to have clarity. 

Take a moment to breathe deeply and ground yourself. You might try reflecting on what events led to this moment—was it unexpected traffic, a last-minute task, or something else? 

As a next step, consider jotting down the main factors that contributed to your lateness. This might help you gain some clarity and feel more in control moving forward.
